AAPL.reasoning: Earnings blackout (0 days to Q2 print) blocks new positions. Head Trader confidence 30 < 40 threshold; risk manager limit 0.0. Macro R/R fails 2:1 minimum (0.71:1 to first resistance). Insider net selling -$235M, valuation 44.8% above DCF fair value. Three of five swing agents neutral; no confirmed breakout above $276.11 or volume confirmation (0.73x avg). Wait for binary event to resolve and a clean post-earnings structure to form before initiating.

key_risks: Earnings binary event (Q2 FY2026 on 2026-04-30) — hold through print creates unquantifiable gap risk
Macro regime risk-off: Dow -5 consecutive sessions, Meta capex shock, Iran energy inflation
Valuation stretched: DCF fair value ~$2.20T vs $3.98T market cap (44.8% premium)
Insider distribution: CEO Cook sold $12M+ at $251-256; net insider flow -$235M
Tariff binary unresolved: 145% tariff scenario collapses iPhone gross margin to 2-3%

post_earnings_watch.bull_case_entry: Clean close above $276.11 on volume >1.5x avg + ADX expansion above 25 → breakout measured move to $296.77
post_earnings_watch.bear_case_entry: Earnings miss or weak guidance → pullback to 38.2% Fib at $264.21 / 20-SMA $264.36 cluster → mean reversion long
post_earnings_watch.invalidation: Close below $255.45 support (21 tests) signals trend break; stand aside
